title: Hush!
content:
Every thought is public,
    Every nook is wide;
    Thy gossips spread each whisper,
    And the gods from side to side.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ralph Waldo Emerson delivers a powerful performance in "Hush!"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
